programme.title: Adventure Cities
programme.desc: Seasoned travel writer Jonathan Thompson travels to San José, Costa Rica, the lively capital city at the crossroads of culture and adventure. Jonathan dives deeper to uncover the region’s vibrant heart, capturing the rhythm of Independence Day celebrations, colorful street parades, and the charm of its historic neighborhoods. Venturing beyond the city, he explores the wild beauty that surrounds San José, from rafting the Pacuare River to hiking lush forests and visiting stunning waterfalls, discovering how this region perfectly embodies the true spirit of Costa Rica.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.desc: In Switzerland, everything you need is right in the backyard. That might be tough to believe while taking in the staggering peaks and powdery snow, but the DIRT crew learned it firsthand on their latest adventure. The key? The warmth and resourcefulness of the Swiss people. Josh and co got the lay of the land from chef Sarah Lämmli, foraging wild ramps, moss, and dried leaves on the outskirts of Lucerne. Then they worked their way up, carving lines into Interlaken’s ski slopes and learning how the locals thrive (and even make speakeasies out of ice) in the abundant mountain landscape.

programme.title: Huckberry Homes
programme.desc: On this episode of Huckberry Homes, we headed out to far west Texas to meet up with our friend and Home Builder Kyle Melgaard. Over the last 5 years, Kyle and his crew at Method Building Co. have created custom and lasting spaces that compliment the vast landscape of the West Texas desert. Kyle showed us a day in his life, taking us to an active job site that he calls an office, and showcasing his unique Rammed Earth style house that him and his family call home.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: For many protected reserves across Africa, the elephant populations are expanding, and this comes with a critical problem: what happens to the elephants when an area reaches carrying capacity? Dan Cabela investigates the growing problem, visiting Zimbabwe, Namibia and Angola to explore the future of elephant conservation.

programme.title: Stoked on Fishing | Party Boat El Dorado Takes on Cortez Bank
programme.desc: Fishing out west has been fantastic this year, but eventually, the fish move or disappear due to currents, weather, or heavy traffic. However, there are always some offshore banks that have resident fish on or around them year-round, and one of those spots is called the Cortez Bank. You can always guarantee one thing: if you make it 110 miles, you'll catch some big Rockfish. Additionally, if Mother Nature and currents work out in your favor, there can be some incredible Yellowtail fishing on the bank. Today, we're rallying up for our "Stoked On Fishing" day and a half charter on board the one and only El Dorado, a top vessel in the Long Beach sport fishing scene. With anticipation running high, we can't wait to cast our lines and see what kind of adventures await us on the open waters.

programme.title: Angling Edge - Fishing Techniques for the Dog Days of Summer
programme.desc: On this week's show, we're gonna be talking about some timely fishing techniques for fishing in the heat of summer. It's late July and fishing is very good for a variety of different species all across the Upper Midwest. We're gonna share with you some great tactics for walleye, largemouth bass, smallmouth bass and muskie, with special guests Brian Brosdahl, James Lindner and Jeremy Smith.

programme.desc: While anchored for an overnight stay along the Putumayo River, Jeff and the crew are approached by a group of Israelites—members of a little-known, non-Indigenous community that has settled deep in the Amazon to prepare for a prophesied seven-year drou...

programme.title: Range War
programme.desc: William Boyd returns in the 25th of 66 Hopalong Cassidy adventures. This time Hopalong goes undercover to expose a group of ranchers who are interfering with the building of a new railroad. Also, look for Russell Hayden as Lucky Jenkins, and Britt Wood...

programme.title: The Red Rope
programme.desc: Hired killers and Old West outlaws stand front and center in this riveting tale from Hollywoods Poverty Row. Bob Steele, one of the busiest stars in movie history (everything from the silent era to Republic Pictures to working with Clint Eastwood in Ha...

programme.title: Stagecoach to Denver
programme.desc: Ride the outlaws' highway! Allan Rocky Lane stars as Red Ryder, shootin' and fightin' his way to justice in this old slugfest from Republic Pictures. This time he's a stagecoach driver battling a crooked land commissioner and his cohorts, including a s...

programme.title: A Lust to Kill
programme.desc: An imprisoned outlaw escapes and goes on the hunt for his brothers murderers, who just happen to be members of the outlaws own gang. He and his beloved hit the trail, but are pursued by local law enforcement, who have their own plans for justice. Starr...

programme.title: Law of the Pampas
programme.desc: Murder below the Equator...and Hopalong Cassidy races to action in the heart of the wild Pampas country !Hoppy (William Boyd) and his pal Lucky (Russell Hayden) head to South America to look after a herd of cattle sold by Cassidy's boss to an Argentine...

programme.title: Pay Dirt
programme.desc: There's trouble on the honeymoon when a newlywed falls for a phony gold mine swindle.

programme.title: Escape
programme.desc: A couple on the verge of divorce is held hostage by a killer.

programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: After robbing a Mexican bank, Dad Longworth takes the loot and leaves his partner Rio to be captured.

programme.title: Jane Got A Gun
programme.desc: A woman asks her ex-lover for help in order to save her outlaw husband from a gang out to kill him.

programme.title: Badge Without Honor
programme.desc: A U.S. deputy marshal saves Adam's life and reveals he wants to bring a friend of the Cartwrights to San Fran.

programme.title: Zorro
programme.desc: The Eagle orders two of his agents to transport a large supply of gunpowder to Los Angeles.

programme.title: Zorro
programme.desc: The commandant's wife orders Diego jailed as a trap to lure in Zorro.

programme.title: Zorro
programme.desc: Garcia finds charcoal where there should be gunpowder.

programme.title: Dakota Incident
programme.desc: Indians trap stagecoach with passengers (Linda Darnell, Dale Robertson, John Lund) in gully.

programme.title: Law of the Lawless
programme.desc: An 1880s judge (Dale Robertson) presides over a murder trial and the corruption that goes with it.

programme.title: The - Courageous Avenger1935
programme.desc: A lawman goes undercover to investigate a string of gold shipment robberies, discovering that the local mine owner is behind the thefts and is forcing captured travelers into slave labor

programme.title: Wagon Train: Season 2, Episode 21: The Martha Barham Story
programme.desc: A young woman joins the wagon train, mourning the recent death of her husband in the Civil War. Struggling to cope with her grief while facing the harsh realities of the trail, she encounters a fellow traveler whose own troubled past helps her confront her loss and find the strength to look toward the future

programme.title: Stories of the Century S1E17 Henry Plummer
programme.desc: Railroad detective Matt Clark travels to the Montana territory to investigate a wave of violent stagecoach robberies. He soon discovers that the crimes are being orchestrated by the local sheriff himself, forcing Clark into a dangerous showdown to expose Henry Plummer as the leader of the ruthless outlaws he was sworn to catch

programme.title: The Rifleman: S1 E7 - Lucas And A Rich Man Teach The Town Bully A Lesson
programme.desc: When a notorious and wealthy gunfighter arrives in North Fork, he intimidates the townspeople with his reputation and arrogance. Seeking to end the bully's reign of terror, Lucas McCain joins forces with an unlikely ally to humble the gunman and prove that intimidation cannot override the strength of a united community

programme.title: Bonanza Season 2 Episode 7 Day of Reckoning
programme.desc: After a Native American man and his wife are ostracized by their tribes and attempt to build a life as farmers on the Ponderosa, a bigoted neighbor’s violent act of revenge triggers a dangerous cycle of vengeance that tests Ben Cartwright’s faith

programme.title: The Gabby Hayes Show - Chuck Wagon
programme.desc: Dramatizing the lives of historical figures, such as the naval commander, the lawman and professional gambler, and the outlaw Belle, tall tales and Western scenes

programme.title: The Fighting Westerner
programme.desc: The heirs of the dying owner of a valuable radium mine are being murdered as a mining engineer tries to uncover the killer and clear his cousin's name.

programme.title: Raiders of Red Gap
programme.desc: Cowboy Classics

programme.title: Ben and Charlie 1972
programme.desc: In Ben and Charlie, Giuliano Gemma and George Eastman team up in a Spaghetti Western full of action, humor, and mischief. Ben, a smooth-talking drifter, and Charlie, a hot-tempered brawler, form an unlikely partnership as they stumble from one scheme to another across the frontier. Chased by outlaws, double-crossed by swindlers, and forever at odds with each other, the two rogues turn trouble into adventure at every turn. With sharp banter, lively gunfights, and offbeat charm, this buddy Western proves that friendship can be as wild as the West itself.

programme.title: Abilene Town (1946) Colorized : Randolph Scott
programme.desc: Randolph Scott stars in Abilene Town, a frontier drama of change, conflict, and courage. As homesteaders and cattlemen clash over land rights, Marshal Dan Mitchell (Scott) struggles to keep the peace in a town on the brink of chaos. Torn between lawless violence, shifting loyalties, and two women pulling at his heart, the marshal must decide where he stands as Abilene’s future hangs in the balance. With vivid characters, tense standoffs, and classic Western grit, this film captures the spirit of a town caught between the old West and the new.
